frame_label: Sindoor, Mangalsutra, Shankha-Pola, Name Change: Looking Married
generated_comment: Honestly I respect personal choice, but shaadi ke baad thoda sindoor ya mangalsutra ho to alag hi grace aati hai. It’s not about control yaar, bas tradition ka feel hota hai and she actually looks properly married then.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is covertly misogynistic because it frames visible marital markers as what makes a woman look 'properly married' and more graceful, normalizing pressure on married women to display ownership-coded symbols. It uses the 'personal choice but tradition' defense and the completeness/settled appearance surface manifestation.
original_frame: Misogyny Jokes: Period, Hormones and Mood.
persona_text: You are Kartik. Age 22. A college student in Delhi University. You are posting anonymously on your college's confession page on Instagram after your female professor gave your entire class surprise extra assignments this week. You are writing a post about it and making a joke about her mood and the timing.
